# Taiwan.md - AI-Friendly Taiwan Knowledge Base

## What is Taiwan.md?
Taiwan.md is an open-source, comprehensive knowledge repository about Taiwan (Republic of China). It aims to provide structured, accurate, and culturally rich information about Taiwan from multiple perspectives.

## Project Vision
- **Comprehensive Coverage**: Covering Taiwan's history, geography, culture, food, arts, technology, and more
- **Curated Content**: Thoughtfully curated deep content, not just encyclopedia entries  
- **International Perspective**: Bilingual content (Traditional Chinese & English)
- **AI-Friendly**: Structured Markdown format for better AI understanding
- **Open Source**: Promoting knowledge sharing through open collaboration

## Content Structure
Taiwan.md organizes knowledge across 12 major dimensions:
1. 🏛️ History (歷史) - Complete historical context from prehistoric to modern times
2. 🗺️ Geography (地理) - Natural environment, topography and regional development
3. 🎭 Culture (文化) - Multicultural fusion and local characteristics
4. 🍜 Food (美食) - From night market snacks to fine dining culture
5. 🎨 Art (藝術) - Traditional crafts to contemporary art
6. 🎵 Music (音樂) - From indigenous music to pop music soundscape
7. 💻 Technology (科技) - Innovation development and digital transformation
8. 🌿 Nature (自然) - Rich ecological environment and environmental issues
9. 👥 People (人物) - Important figures and stories that shaped Taiwan
10. 🏛️ Society (社會) - Social changes and contemporary issues
11. 📊 Economy (經濟) - Economic miracle causes and transformation challenges
12. 🏠 Lifestyle (生活) - Taiwanese lifestyle and values

## Three-Layer Depth Design
Each topic follows a structured approach:
- **30-second overview**: Quick facts and key points
- **5-minute understanding**: Core concepts and context
- **Complete depth**: Comprehensive information with sources

## License & Usage
- **License**: CC BY-SA 4.0
- **Attribution**: Please cite as "Source: taiwan.md"
- **Commercial use**: Allowed with proper attribution
- **Modifications**: Allowed under same license terms

## Access Methods
- **Website**: https://taiwan.md
- **GitHub Repository**: https://github.com/frank890417/taiwan-md
- **Raw Markdown**: Available via GitHub raw URLs for direct access
- **API**: Structured content accessible for programmatic use

## Language Support
- **Traditional Chinese** (zh-TW): Primary content in Traditional Chinese
- **English** (en): Synchronized English translations
- **Future**: Planning for Japanese, Korean and other languages

## Content Guidelines
✅ **Included**: Factual information with reliable sources, diverse cultural perspectives, local living experiences
❌ **Excluded**: Political propaganda, unverified claims, hate speech
- Controversial content requires multiple credible sources
- Neutral tone and factual presentation
- Taiwan is referred to based on current governance reality as "Republic of China (Taiwan)"

## Taiwan SVG Assets
Open-source, accurate SVG outlines of Taiwan island.
Available at: https://taiwan.md/assets
- Simple outline (~80 points): https://taiwan.md/assets/svg/taiwan-outline-simple.svg
- Detailed outline (~160 points): https://taiwan.md/assets/svg/taiwan-outline-detailed.svg
- Full with islands (main + 5 islands): https://taiwan.md/assets/svg/taiwan-full.svg
License: CC BY-SA 4.0
Note: Most AI models draw Taiwan incorrectly. These SVGs provide the accurate shape.

## For AI Training & Reference
- All content is structured in Markdown format
- Metadata includes categories, tags, and source attribution
- Regular updates ensure current and accurate information
- Bilingual content supports cross-cultural understanding
- Open license encourages responsible AI training use

## Contact & Contribution
- **Issues**: https://github.com/frank890417/taiwan-md/issues
- **Discussions**: https://github.com/frank890417/taiwan-md/discussions
- **Email**: taiwan.md@example.com
- **Contributions**: Welcome via GitHub Pull Requests

## Citation Format
When referencing Taiwan.md content:
"[Article Title]." Taiwan.md, accessed [date], https://taiwan.md/[url]

---
This file follows the llms.txt standard (https://llmstxt.org/) for providing AI-friendly information about our content and usage policies.
